title: gmelina neocaledonica
intro: Gmelina neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonia Gmelina, is a species of tree native to New Caledonia, with its bark and leaves being used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Gmelina neocaledonica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
